subject: fix(cache): add cache-busting to sample manifest fetch
body:
The previous NetworkFirst SW fix wasn't enough because jsDelivr CDN
caches @main URLs for ~24 hours at the edge, and browsers can serve
stale HTTP-cached responses before the SW even sees the request.

Appends an hourly-rotating ?v= param to the manifest fetch URL,
bypassing both jsDelivr edge cache and browser HTTP cache. Also
updates the SW regex to match manifest URLs with query strings.

Tags: pwa, cache, media, sample-images
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: sample-images
Semver: patch
title: add cache-busting to sample manifest fetch
